command: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 900 -- bash scripts/rig/onboarding_snippet_truth.sh run --log

checks.name: claude_mcp_json
checks.assertion: The command and args extracted from the printed Claude MCP JSON completed raw stdio MCP initialize and tools/list.

checks.name: codex_config_toml
checks.assertion: The command and args extracted from the printed Codex TOML completed raw stdio MCP initialize and tools/list.

checks.name: http_client_credentials.claude_mcp_add
checks.assertion: The exact printed claude mcp add command registered an HTTP MCP URL without bearer/header material; raw initialize against the client-credential server returned 401 client_credential_required.

confidentiality.notes: The runner writes clients-issue.stdout.redacted instead of storing the shown-once bearer. Profile material is the synthetic setup template for c9_ro.
